attacking_style: Launches multiple attacks on climbs but lacks finishing punch to deliver knockout blow. Capable of sustained solo bridging efforts but typically absorbed or outsprinted in final kilometers.
team_tactics: Initially positioned as protected leader but vulnerable to internal team hierarchy challenges. Limited evidence of systematic team setup; appears to operate independently in key moments.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with circuit finales or sustained climbs where endurance matters. Struggles to convert attacking position into stage wins on any terrain when matched by stronger finishers.
vulnerability: Cannot shake elite climbers (Roglič, Thomas) despite repeated attacks. Lacks killer instinct in final 700m, consistently settling for minor placings when within winning position.
key_patterns: Attacks climbs repeatedly but fails to drop top GC riders (2 instances against Roglič/Thomas)
Strong enough to reach winning positions but absorbed in final kilometers (2 instances)
Settles for wheel-sitting when matched rather than countering or continuing pressure (Romandie 2019)
Team leadership status unstable, vulnerable to being superseded by teammates (Carapaz at Giro 2018)
form_trajectory: negative: Demonstrating consistent pattern of near-misses and leadership uncertainty. Cannot convert opportunities despite reaching podium positions.
